name: Rosemary Chicken with Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons bottled minced garlic (equivalent to 4 cloves of fresh garlic, minced)
12 ounces chicken breasts or thighs, skinless and boneless
8 ounces pasta (such as penne, mostaccioli, or elbow macaroni)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the onions and garlic in a 3-1/2 to 4-1/2 quart slow cooker.
2. Rinse the chicken and pat dry with paper towels. Add the chicken to the slow cooker.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine undrained tomatoes, tomato paste, wine vinegar, bay leaves, sugar, dried rosemary, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 7 hours or on high heat setting for 3-1/2 hours.
6. When ready to serve, remove the bay leaves. Stir mushrooms into the chicken mixture and cook for an additional 5 to 10 minutes to heat through.
7. Meanwhile, cook the pasta according to package directions.
8. Serve the chicken and sauce over the hot cooked pasta, sprinkled with grated Parmesan cheese.
